##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Cd_0.91_Zn_0.05_Pb_0.04_)CO_3_ ; = lighter phase. The crystal is zoned. The darker phase is (Cd_0.93_Zn_0.05_Pb_0.02_)CO_3_   the inclusion is cerussite: Pb_1.00_CO_3_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 4.9138 b: 4.9138 c: 16.325 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 341.38 crystal system: hexagonal
